message:
docs(freeze): Document full refactoring approach for emitCommonOpcode

After POC proving emitCommonOpcode works, attempted full extraction of 133
shared opcodes. Automated extraction scripts successfully:
- Identified 133 shared opcodes between emitTrampolineInstruction and emitInstruction
- Extracted implementations from emitInstruction (which has full Zig support)
- Generated ~1600 line emitCommonOpcode function
- Removed duplicates from both calling functions

However, build errors occurred due to edge cases in opcode extraction
(complex multi-line opcodes, comments, special cases).

**Current state:**
- POC works: 3 opcodes (drop, dup, add) successfully shared
- Proves the refactoring pattern is sound
- Full extraction requires more careful handling

**Approach for full refactoring (documented for future):**
1. Extract opcodes in batches of 10-20 (not all 133 at once)
2. Test each batch individually
3. Handle special cases manually (complex opcodes with helpers)
4. Estimated work: 133 opcodes / 10 per batch = ~13 batches

**Benefits when complete:**
- Eliminates ~2400 lines of duplication
- Single source of truth for shared opcodes
- Easier to maintain and add new opcodes

**Trade-offs:**
- May lose some path-specific optimizations
- Large one-time refactoring effort
